untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'spike velocity' and 'bounce confirmation reversal within N bars' which are not directly available as indicators. Spike velocity needs multi-bar momentum comparison (true_range spike relative to ATR approximated). Bounce confirmation % within specific bar count requires look-ahead logic not expressible in simple rule format. Threshold values for std-dev bands, velocity multiplier, bounce %, and volume multiplier are placeholders requiring calibration.
translation_notes: Translated overextension (spike beyond Bollinger Bands) + high velocity (true_range > ATR) + volume confirmation. Used pivot points (S1/R1) as support/resistance levels. Entry is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT (LONG on lower band break, SHORT on upper band break). Exit conditions set at support/resistance break. Unable to express exact bar-count bounce confirmation without look-ahead.
